text.title: feature-prioritization-rice Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for feature-prioritization-rice as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Cross-team comparison using the same Reach unit: "Reach = 10K" means different things for free-tier vs paid-tier customers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Comparing RICE scores across segments with different conversion rates mixes apples and oranges. Partition by segment before scoring.

failure-mode.description: Effort estimated by PM without engineering input, producing scores that look good until sprint planning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PM effort estimates are optimistic by construction. Engineer ownership of the E column is structural, not optional.

failure-mode.description: Re-scoring retroactively to "explain" why a shipped feature succeeded.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Retroactive scoring destroys the calibration data needed to improve future estimates. Keep original scores immutable; add actuals as a separate column.
